site: MCB Quantico — northern perimeter sector NPC-7 (synthetic)
tasking: Persistent ISR over reported intrusion vector; report any FOMO (forces of military observation) activity, vehicle ingress/egress, or anomalous heat sources.

ground_truth_phases.narrative: Two dismounts emerge from north tree-line moving south toward parked sedan; vehicle thermally cold (long-parked).
Third dismount joins from west; vehicle hood + exhaust warming — engine just started.
Vehicle departs east off-frame; small fire ignites at perimeter barrel (possible signal/marker).
Generator at LZ pad spins up; remaining personnel disperse to defensive arc.

real_dataset_provenance.name: HIT-UAV: A High-altitude Infrared Thermal Dataset for UAV-based Object Detection
real_dataset_provenance.note: Synthetic frames generated here for hackathon demo; identical pipeline (grayscale 8-bit + bbox JSON) ingests HIT-UAV unchanged.
